overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking along a medieval harbor dock. The character boards a large red ship, crosses its deck, and returns to the dock while passing various NPC workers and guards in a sunny waterfront setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden harbor dock with cargo storage

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the wooden dock, passing cargo crates and coils of rope while heading toward the ships

notable_agents.action: shirtless dock worker carrying wooden planks toward the ship
worker in brown clothing walking along the waterfront

entered.detail: large red sailing ship with white cross markings moored alongside the dock
stacked wooden cargo crates for goods storage
thick coiled mooring ropes piled on the dock
dark-hulled sailing vessel anchored in the harbor water
cluster of medieval stone and timber-framed buildings along the waterfront
wooden barrels used for cargo storage

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunlit wooden harbor dock lined with cargo crates, barrels, and thick rope coils. A large red ship with white markings is moored on the right, while a black vessel sits in the water to the left. Medieval town buildings rise in the background as dock workers go about their business.

scene_state.functional_zone: deck of a large sailing ship

events.description: Geralt steps from the wooden dock onto the grid-patterned deck of the red ship
Geralt turns slightly while crossing the ship deck to navigate around obstacles

agents.ego_description: Geralt boards the ship and walks across its deck, examining the vessel's layout and surroundings

entered.detail: dark wooden deck with distinct grid pattern and metal fasteners
tall wooden masts with complex rigging and furled sails
wooden ladder leaning against the ship's railing
large wooden steering wheel for navigation
wooden stairs leading down from the deck to the dock

segments.scene_description: Geralt boards the large red ship, walking across its grid-patterned wooden deck. The ship's masts and rigging tower overhead, with a wooden steering wheel visible in the distance. The dock and cargo are left behind as he explores the vessel's deck, eventually approaching the stairs to return.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy harbor dock with water wheel structure

events.description: Geralt steps back onto the wooden dock from the ship deck
Geralt passes a group of guards in red armor standing watch near the ship railing

agents.ego_description: Geralt returns to the dock and continues walking along the waterfront, passing various NPCs including guards and workers

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor standing watch near the ship
shirtless dock worker carrying a heavy sack

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the harbor dock
large wooden water wheel mechanism for dock operations

segments.scene_description: Returning to the dock, Geralt walks past a large wooden water wheel structure and encounters guards in red armor standing watch. The dock becomes busier with workers and townspeople moving about, while the red ship remains prominent along the right side. The character continues along the waterfront, passing cargo and ropes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a bustling medieval harbor that transitions from the open dock onto a moored vessel and back again. It begins with Geralt walking along a sunlit wooden dock lined with cargo crates and barrels, flanked by a large red ship on the right and a black vessel to the left. As he boards the red ship, the perspective shifts from the harbor floor to a grid-patterned wooden deck beneath towering masts and rigging. The scene then transitions back to the waterfront as he descends the stairs, passing a large wooden water wheel and guards in red armor. Finally, the camera continues along the busy dock, moving past townspeople and cargo as the red ship remains a prominent fixture in the sunny landscape.
